caption: A person with a white smartwatch is using a paper trimmer on a white wooden surface to cut a piece of patterned green and yellow paper. In the first frame, the person's left hand holds the paper steady against the guide while their right hand positions the sliding blade. By the second frame, the right hand begins to slide the cutting blade across the paper. In the third frame, the person's right hand is shown completing the downward cutting motion. In the final frame, the right hand pulls the blade away from the cut edge. A logo for "Stamping Jill" is visible in the bottom-left corner of each scene, and a package labeled "Thank You" sits to the right of the trimmer. Small labels on the equipment include text such as "1/8" & 1/4" marks" and "Lead things."
